name: NodeData
description: Data associated with a ZooKeeper node managed by Apache Curator, including its path, data payload, and stat metadata.

path.description: Full ZooKeeper path of this node.

data.description: Node data as a Base64-encoded string or UTF-8 text.

stat.description: ZooKeeper Stat object with node metadata.

czxid.description: Transaction ID that created this node.

mzxid.description: Transaction ID of the last modification.

ctime.description: Creation time in milliseconds since epoch.

mtime.description: Last modification time in milliseconds since epoch.

version.description: Number of changes to this node data.

cversion.description: Number of changes to the children of this node.

aversion.description: Number of changes to the ACL of this node.

dataLength.description: Length of the data field in bytes.

ephemeralOwner.description: Session ID of the owner if ephemeral, 0 otherwise.
